name: Steel Prefab Buildings
description:
Steel prefab building is a factory-fabricated structures built around a structural steel frame and delivered as finished, multi-room buildings — not bare shells. SAMAN manufactures and installs them from facilities in Bangalore and Greater Noida (Delhi NCR). The standard configuration is a 60 ft × 36 ft × 14 ft building — 2,160 sq ft of floor area — priced at ₹20,45,000, with the layout, partitions, and openings set to your brief before fabrication begins.

What Is a Steel Prefab Building?

A steel prefab building is a building whose primary structure — columns, rafters, and bracing — is fabricated from structural steel in a factory, then bolted together on site and fitted out as a finished, partitioned building. Unlike a bare clear-span shell, it arrives with internal walls, flooring, doors, and a usable multi-room interior.

A finished steel prefab building on an SME compound — windows and entry mark the multi-room interior.

That makes it different from both a poured RCC building and an open shed: the steel frame carries the load, panel cladding encloses it, and internal partitions divide it into the rooms your operation actually needs.

Why a Structural Steel Frame

Steel is the load-bearing choice when a building has to go up quickly and stay serviceable for decades. SAMAN prefab steel frame buildings use primer- and corrosion-protected steel sections sized to the load and wind zone of your site, with a bolted column-and-rafter assembly that needs no site welding. The frame reaches lock-up in weeks where conventional RCC takes months. Because every connection is bolted, the building can also be dismantled and relocated if your site changes — the factory-fabricated frame is built to be reused, not demolished.

The bolted steel frame going up on a concrete plinth — the assembly that reaches lock-up in weeks.

The structural steel frame sits on a concrete plinth with anchor bolts set to SAMAN's layout drawing, and is rated for a design life of 30 years or more.

What ₹20,45,000 Buys — the 60×36×14 ft Building

Inside the building — internal partitions divide the 2,160 sq ft into the rooms your layout needs.

At ₹20,45,000 for 2,160 sq ft, a SAMAN steel prefab building works out to roughly ₹947 per square foot for the delivered, installed structure — a figure most prefab steel buildings cost comparisons leave to a quote. Here is what that configuration includes:

Component Included in the ₹20,45,000 configuration
Structural frame 60×36×14 ft steel columns, rafters, bracing
Wall & roof Insulated panel cladding, steel roof sheeting
Flooring Structural floor deck (steel & wood)
Internal partitions Room divisions per your approved layout
Doors & windows Standard set positioned to the layout
Delivery & installation Transport plus on-site bolted assembly

Larger spans (custom widths up to roughly 50 m) and additional rooms change the price; the 60×36×14 ft building is the standard reference configuration to quote from.

Steel Prefab Buildings vs Prefabricated Steel Buildings — Which You Need

"Steel prefab building" and "prefabricated steel building" describe the same material, but on SAMAN they answer two different briefs.

A steel prefab building finished as a commercial unit — the "finished building" choice over a bare structure.

Choose a steel prefab building — this product — when you want a finished, single-block prefab steel commercial building with rooms, a set price, and a fast turnaround: an office block, a clinic, a showroom, an institutional unit. Move to our IS-certified prefabricated steel buildings when the project needs multi-bay or multi-storey structural engineering, specified IS steel grades, and span, height, and cladding designed to a structural spec. If you are buying a usable building, you are on the right page; if you are specifying a structure, the prefabricated steel buildings page goes deeper.

Where This Fits in SAMAN's Prefab Building Range

A steel prefab building is one format within SAMAN's prefab building range, which also covers commercial, industrial, and modular-office variants.

On a factory campus, the steel prefab building is the multi-room block — distinct from the open shed behind it.

If your project actually needs a single-span open floor with nothing dividing it — a storage or production span with no internal rooms — that is an industrial shed rather than a building, and a different SAMAN product line. For a multi-room steel building, this configuration is the place to start.

Steel Prefab Buildings — FAQs

Should I choose steel prefab buildings or prefabricated steel buildings?

Choose a steel prefab building when you want a finished, multi-room building delivered at a set price and size — like the 60×36×14 ft configuration. Choose prefabricated steel buildings when you need multi-bay or multi-storey structural engineering to an IS-certified spec. Same steel; different depth of structural design.

How long does a steel prefab building last?

A SAMAN steel prefab building is designed for a service life of 30 years or more. The structural steel frame is corrosion-protected, and because connections are bolted rather than site-welded, worn panels or fittings can be replaced without disturbing the frame.

Steel prefab building vs RCC — which costs less?

For a comparable multi-room building, steel prefab is usually faster to build and competitive on total cost: factory fabrication cuts site labour, material waste, and the months of curing RCC needs. For most buyers the bigger saving is time — weeks to lock-up instead of months.

What does the ₹20,45,000 steel prefab building include?

That price covers the 60×36×14 ft (2,160 sq ft) building: the structural steel frame, insulated wall and roof panels, flooring, internal partitions to your layout, a standard set of doors and windows, plus delivery and on-site installation. Changes to size or room count adjust the price.

Get a Quote for a Steel Prefab Building

Send your size and layout and we'll quote the building, including delivery and installation.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859

Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
